calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Peterson for Nancy Taylor.

Mr. Peterson stated that he feels the bill for the work done to the property has precedence over the Medi Cal claim. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jones. (Not Reported)
